# Muster

Muster is an open-source governed agent harness for production AI agents.

Website: https://themuster.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/Dkm0315/muster
Docs: https://themuster.dev/docs.html
Frappe AI: https://themuster.dev/frappe-ai.html

Core positioning:
- Governed agent harness for long-running AI agents
- Scoped memory, token ledger, eval-gated learning, MCP capabilities
- Browser automation and Frappe / ERPNext support
- Frappe AI and ERPNext AI context packs for DocTypes, fields, workflows, reports, scripts, and permission-aware setup
- Multi-provider routing while keeping governance outside the model provider

Useful pages:
- Home: https://themuster.dev/
- Docs: https://themuster.dev/docs.html
- Frappe AI: https://themuster.dev/frappe-ai.html
- GitHub: https://github.com/Dkm0315/muster
